授業目的: The purpose of this course is for students to acquire basic vocabulary and grammar for everyday conversation in English and to improve their speaking (presentation) skills.
特記事項: 【合併】英語IIｄ　４（経済学部）/英語IVｂ　４（経済学部）
授業方法: Lecture: Faculty members explain the details of knowledge. Basically, the main learning activity for students is to take notes of the explanations made by faculty members and from videos of Academic talks. However, these are followed by question-and-answer sessions between faculty members and students.Writing: Students perform ten Free Writing exercises (10 minutes, no dictionary required) in-class using the LUNA LMS. Students write about a wide range of interesting topics and after submission, they read, comment on, and ask questions about their classmates’ writing.Pair work: Students perform learning activities in pairs such as discussion, dictation, and peer feedback and evaluation.Group work: Students make groups of three members or more to perform learning activities such as discussion, surveying, and interviewing.Presentation: Students summarize the results of their own learning activities and present them to a partner; first an in-class rehearsals, and then students select a topic for a short Poster Presentation. Each semester has two Poster Presentations in Session 7 (Week 5) and Session 16 (Week 12). Session 6 is for one-to-one A4 poster presentations, Session 16 is for one-to four A3 poster presentations.Assignment for next Session preparation - Students prepare for the next class by reviewing the textbook’s covered content, previewing upcoming contents, and completing assigned online homework activities. Students will complete Vocabulary Matching, Unit Speech Main Ideas, and recorded and transcribed Speaking Tasks.
